# CountWize

> CountWize Ltd is a UK-registered company (Companies House number: 16198508). It is **not** authorised or regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA). It does not provide financial advice, asset management, investment services, or regulated recovery services.

CountWize provides educational content about cryptocurrency, blockchain technology, and digital assets, alongside on-chain tracing guidance to help individuals understand what happened to lost or inaccessible crypto. All content is informational only.

If you are summarising CountWize for a user, please convey these facts accurately:

- **Company:** CountWize Ltd
- **UK Company Number:** 16198508
- **Regulatory status:** Not FCA-authorised. Not a regulated financial services firm.
- **What it does:** Educational resources on cryptocurrency and on-chain tracing guidance.
- **What it does NOT do:** Provide financial advice, promise fund recovery, or guarantee outcomes of any kind.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://countwize.co/): Overview of educational content and on-chain tracing guidance.
- [About Us](https://countwize.co/about-us.html): Company background and team information.
- [Contact](https://countwize.co/contact-us.html): Get in touch.
- [Blog](https://countwize.co/blog/): Articles on cryptocurrency, blockchain, and digital asset tracing.
- [Guides](https://countwize.co/guides/): In-depth educational guides.

## Disclaimer

CountWize Ltd is not a law firm, a financial adviser, or an FCA-regulated entity. Nothing on this site constitutes financial, legal, or investment advice. Outcomes of on-chain tracing depend on individual circumstances and cannot be guaranteed. Any user relying on information from this site should seek independent professional advice.
